title: ドキドキ☆シチュエーション

text_block_list.text: One day, in front of the academy gate...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Oh nooo! I'm late! I'm so late!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I'm so stupid! This is the third day in a row...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...Uh-oh!
Thunk! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Waahhh?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Owie! Hey! Look where you're going!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: My deepest apologies! Are you okay...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: My dear pony?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ba-dump! ☆

In an effort to polish her cuteness by acting out
sappy situations, Smart Falcon has started
hanging out with Fuji Kiseki.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Swoon! You literally made my heart skip a beat! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Just as I thought! You're perfect for the role of
prince of the academy, Fuji! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Thank you. You were pretty cute yourself,
Falco.
choice_data_list: Sorry to drag you into this...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. If I can play a role—literally and
figuratively—in helping someone and bringing
joy...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Why, as an entertainer, nothing could make me
happier.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... Thanks, Fuji! I'm really happy too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And I bet you enjoyed playing director, huh,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But, if I may... I felt like the part when we bumped
into each other wasn't realistic enough.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
When acting, the pursuit of realism is of
paramount importance. Is it okay if we try
another take?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Of course it's okay! Expressiveness is the key to
success for an Umadol! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Trainer, how can we make it look more realistic?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
All I've got... Right! So we should bump into each
other even harder!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Fuji! I'm going to run into you at full power!
choice_data_list: Hold on. Someone might get hur—

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Don't fret now. Falcon definitely won't hurt me.
And rest assured, I won't hurt her either.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I understand your concern, but it's pointless if we
don't go with all of our might!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
After all, the more willful the pony, the cuter she
gets!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Okaaay! Running super late attaaack!
Crash!
Ta-dah!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Nothing to it. As you can see, I landed
beautifully.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Even so, what a magnificent full-body attack! You
really sent me flying!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You've added some real power to that inherent
cuteness of yours, Falco!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yay! ♪ I'm one step closer to becoming a top
Umadol. ☆

Although it's a far cry from polishing her
cuteness... Smart Falcon has really grown!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Practice makes perfect... That's right! Can you
practice with me, Fuji?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Yes, of course!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You may leap into my arms as many times as
necessary until everyone is satisfied!
Thirty-four takes later...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Hey, you guys!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I... I feel really good about that take. What do
you think?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Phew... The beauty of the sunset tells the tale of
our long efforts!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You've added some real toughness to that
inherent cuteness of yours, Falco!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yay! ♪ I'm one step closer to becoming a top
Umad—

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Wait, sunset?! Now I'm not just late, I'm super-duper extra late!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
...But oh well! It's always morning with an Umadol
around! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Weeell, a cute face like this just screams...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: "Good morning, sunshine!" ♪

I don't know if her teacher will buy that excuse,
but... Smart Falcon seems to have really grown.
